arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund star BREAKS Mohamed Salah's Champions League record - but his hat-trick is in vain as Barcelona survive to reach semi-finals
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund faced a tricky task from the start given the Catalan giants held a 4-0 aggregate lead from last week's first leg following a dominant performance.

arts.ttl: Araujo admits Dortmund tie ‘could have slipped away’ from Barca
arts.sum: Barcelona defender Ronald Araujo is happy to be in the semi-finals of the Champions League but admits the tie with Dortmund could have slipped away from his side. “I personally had never played in the semifinals, so I’m happy because we’re doing well.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick reveals downcast Barcelona emotions despite Champions League progression
arts.sum: Barcelona did not have it easy against Borussia Dortmund, but they did enough to book their place in the Champions League semi-finals. They were defeated 3-1 in their quarter-final second leg on Tuesday, but in the end, they progressed 5-3 on aggregate. Dortmund were on top throughout the 90 minutes at the Signal Iduma Park, […] The post Hansi Flick reveals downcast Barcelona emotions despite Champions League progression appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: "We are out because of the away game" - Groß pins BVB elimination on first-leg disaster
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund's 33-year-old midfielder reacted to his side's performance tonight.

arts.ttl: Guirassy hat-trick in vain for Dortmund as Barcelona advance to semis
arts.sum: Serhou Guirassy scored a hat-trick and still ended up on the losing side as Borussia Dortmund's 3-1 win over Barcelona wasn't enough to prevent a 5-3 aggregate loss in the Champions League quarter-finals.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star admits to being ‘very disappointed’ after Dortmund clash
arts.sum: Barcelona star Jules Koundé has admitted that he was left with a bitter taste in his mouth on Tuesday evening. This, of course, comes fresh off Barcelona keeping alive their…

arts.ttl: Serhou Guirassy hat-trick in vain as Barcelona hold on against Borussia Dortmund to reach semi-finals
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund 3-1 Barcelona (3-5 agg.): A win on the night was not enough for the German side to overturn their first-leg deficit

arts.ttl: Who Are Barcelona Playing in the Champions League Semifinals?
arts.sum: Barcelona will play either Inter Milan or Bayern Munich in the Champions League semifinals.

arts.ttl: MOTM Poll: Borussia Dortmund Fall Just Short in Valiant Effort Against Barcelona
arts.sum: I thought Adeyemi was key to Dortmund’s success tonight, even though he came away with nothing to show for it. Heading into tonight's second leg against Barcelona, Borussia Dortmund knew they would need to achieve the unthinkable to stay alive in the Champions League and progress to the semi-final.

arts.ttl: First semi-finals since 2019 - Flick has returned Barcelona to the Champions League top table
arts.sum: Barcelona looked far from their best on Tuesday night, when Dortmund comfortably beat them 3-1 in the Champions League. Fortunately for Hansi Flick and his team, the result was unfortunate but...
